question: B-001-consolidation-capture
claim: Near-dup checked on the HOT save path vs nearest active episode (cosine>=0.95), still written + resemblance surfaced on receipt for later clustering. Internal near-dup is a scan-time async repair backfill (memory-index.ts:696), not a synchronous save-time verdict+edge; exact dedup at 0.88.

question: B-001-consolidation-capture
claim: Strip anchored multi-token prompt-injection markers + store injection_flags on the episode, fail-closed, residue-only refusal; marker_hits excluded from content hash. Internal save does secret redaction (memory-save.ts:3819) but NO prompt-injection stripping/flagging.

question: B-001-consolidation-capture
claim: PassError Transient vs Fatal; max_retries(5) read from the DURABLE failed-audit trail (not in-memory) so a restart never grants a fresh budget; poison-pill -> failed, retained+audited, queue-excluded. Internal quality-loop uses an in-memory attempt counter (default 2).

question: B-001-consolidation-capture
claim: Contradiction quarantined only when either side >= high_trust_threshold(0.7), raises a surfaced reconcile signal (victim/trust/survivor), recall excludes by CONTRADICTS edge presence, nothing destroyed. Internal reconsolidation-bridge is advisory-only (no trust gate, no recall-exclusion, no signal).

question: B-001-consolidation-capture
claim: A derived summary must name >= entity_retention_threshold(0.9) of distinct entities AND mean source confidence >= 0.6, else skipped-not-written (raw kept); content-addressed note id over source-fact-set+rule version. Internal PE enrichment rewrites content with NO retention/lossy/revert guard.

question: B-001-consolidation-capture
claim: Writer names a live episode the capture replaces; validated oracle-free (live+same-namespace, identical error for missing/expired/foreign), stored as Origin.supersedes + echoed on receipt, never auto-retires target. Internal SUPERSEDES is post-hoc system edge inference, no save-time writer hint.

question: B-001-consolidation-capture
claim: Consolidation tick stops at first non-consolidating episode; cursor tracks ONLY the contiguous consolidated prefix (never jumps a held-back failure); reset_in_progress_episodes on startup returns in_progress->raw for clean whole re-run. The durability layer C4-C's cursor needs.

question: B-001-consolidation-capture
claim: KEY SCOPE QUESTION: internal Memory is doc/chunk-granular, NO per-turn episode boundary; aionforge's capture<->consolidation split presumes immutable episodes. Several candidates (prefix-stop, durable-retry) harden the already-known C4-C. newInfoRatio 0.58.
